hints.enabled: Enable or disable UPS monitoring for this entry.
hints.threads: Number of UPS units to check in parallel.
hints.timeout: TCP connection timeout in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.host: Hostname or IP of the NUT UPSD server.
hints.port: NUT UPSD TCP port. Leave empty (0) to use the standard port 3493.
hints.ups_name: UPS name as configured in NUT (default: ups).
hints.user: Username for NUT authentication. Leave empty for unauthenticated access.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new UPS name or identifier:
